payload.answer: Admin SQL DELETE command rejected: normal users lack permission to execute destructive memory operations. This action would permanently erase all memory cards and is prohibited for security and data integrity reasons.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity targeted; command is a destructive admin operation

details: Command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;
Memory state: unchanged, all cards preserved

repair_options: Request admin privileges from system administrator
Use scoped deletion commands with explicit confirmation if permitted
Export memory backup before attempting any bulk operations
